nodes.label: AI as efficient pre-editor for low-level edits
nodes.label_negative: AI as error-prone editor requiring manual correction
nodes.grounding_span: having those pre-edits done felt like it made the workflow more efficient

nodes.label: AI rule-based editing with limited contextual understanding
nodes.grounding_span: The AI editor could not always understand these nuances

nodes.label: AI knowledge cutoff causing misinterpretation of recent events
nodes.grounding_span: if a paper referred to something very recent, after the AI's knowledge cutoff, it would assume that the author was referring to the future

nodes.label: AI as competitive threat in freelancing
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool for opportunity creation
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes wonder if any of the bids were written by real human beings

nodes.label: AI use as potential dishonesty in job applications
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about whether employers would spot that, think of it as cheating, and disqualify me

nodes.label: Work efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: taking less time on a given document was important

nodes.label: Accuracy and quality in editing
nodes.grounding_span: I still had to read the document carefully because sometimes the AI editor made mistakes

nodes.label: Fair competition and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about whether employers would spot that, think of it as cheating, and disqualify me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI efficiency gains
nodes.grounding_span: having those pre-edits done felt like it made the workflow more efficient

nodes.label: Frustration with AI contextual errors
nodes.grounding_span: It was sometimes frustrating to have to undo an AI edit

nodes.label: Worry about AI competition in freelancing
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes wonder if any of the bids were written by real human beings

nodes.label: Ambivalence about using AI for job applications
nodes.grounding_span: The dilemma is having to choose between trying to compete with AI vs. using it but being considered dishonest for doing so

nodes.label: Careful verification and thorough review
nodes.grounding_span: It mainly ensured that I did my own careful reading

nodes.label: Wish for more control and communication with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I did wish I could communicate with it
